strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React work across product companies (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling — a rare direct match for the JD requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks/libraries, ran testing workshops and courses
concerns: No stated experience with Nest.js, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears dated and limited to older robotics/tooling work
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly listed — testing expertise is proven but partly in D-language ecosystems
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with broad fullstack, cloud (AWS, Kubernetes, Docker), and database (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) experience, plus current, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work. Testing and craftsmanship credentials are exceptional. Gaps are framework-level (Nest.js, Kotlin, Vitest) rather than conceptual, and his polyglot track record (TypeScript, D, Java, C++, Swift, PHP) suggests fast ramp-up. Strong fit for a senior IC building internal automation tooling.
